name: Third Coast Bancshares, Inc.
business: Third Coast Bancshares is a bank holding company that operates through its wholly owned subsidiary, Third Coast Bank, providing commercial banking solutions to small and medium-sized businesses and professionals in Texas markets.

exposures.sentence: systems failures, fraudulent activity, interruptions or data breaches involving our information technology and communications systems of third parties
the rise of Artificial Intelligence as a commonly used resource in banking

catalysts.event: Completed merger with Keystone Bancshares, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On February 1, 2026, we completed our merger with Keystone, the parent company of Keystone Bank, SSB, a Texas state savings bank, pursuant to the terms of the Agreement and Plan of Reorganization, dated as of October 22, 2025, by and among the Company, Arch Merger Sub, Inc., a Texas corporation and a wholly owned subsidiary of the Company, and Keystone.
